tests.scenario: Access meditation content without ads
tests.expected_result: No ads are displayed throughout the meditation content

tests.scenario: Verify ad absence in specific meditation session
steps: Observe the session for ad interruptions
tests.expected_result: The meditation session plays without any ad interruptions

tests.scenario: Access meditation content without subscription
tests.expected_result: No subscription or payment prompts are displayed

tests.scenario: Verify free access to all meditation content
steps: Open the app as a new user
Attempt to access a meditation session
tests.expected_result: All meditation content is accessible without any payment or subscription requests

tests.scenario: Sleep content plays uninterrupted when device screen is locked
steps: Launch Medito app and start playing sleep content
tests.expected_result: Sleep content continues playing without interruption or pause

tests.scenario: Sleep content plays uninterrupted when app is minimized
steps: Launch Medito app and start playing sleep content
tests.expected_result: Sleep content continues playing without interruption or pause

tests.scenario: Queued playback of two sleep tracks
steps: Wait for the first track to end
tests.expected_result: The second track starts automatically without interruption

tests.scenario: Repeat playback of one sleep track
steps: Play a sleep track with repeat on
Wait for the track to end
tests.expected_result: The same track restarts automatically without a blocking popup

tests.scenario: Meditation option is presented immediately on app launch
tests.expected_result: Meditation option is visible on the screen within 3 seconds

tests.scenario: Meditation option is not presented immediately on app launch
tests.expected_result: Meditation option is not visible on the screen after 3 seconds

tests.scenario: Valid meditation options display
tests.expected_result: At least 5 different meditation options are displayed

tests.scenario: Edge case - No internet connection
tests.expected_result: At least 5 different meditation options are displayed

tests.scenario: Valid user login
tests.expected_result: Displays current meditation streak and total number of meditations within 2 seconds

tests.scenario: User has 0 meditations
steps: Log in with valid credentials of a user with 0 meditations
tests.expected_result: Displays 0 for both meditation streak and total number of meditations within 2 seconds

tests.scenario: User completes a meditation course on one device and checks progress on another
steps: Log in on Device 2 with the same account
tests.expected_result: The course completion status is displayed consistently on Device 2

tests.scenario: User logs in on multiple devices and checks course progress
steps: Log in on Device 1 and Device 2 with the same account
Enroll in a meditation course on Device 1
tests.expected_result: The updated course completion status is reflected on Device 2 in real-time

tests.scenario: Resume meditation playback after pausing and relaunching the app
steps: Launch the app and start a meditation
tests.expected_result: Meditation playback resumes from the exact point it was paused

tests.scenario: Resume meditation playback after pausing, relaunching, and verifying accuracy
steps: Launch the app and start a meditation
Pause the meditation playback at a specific timestamp
Verify the meditation playback resumes within 1 second of the paused timestamp
tests.expected_result: Meditation playback resumes within 1 second of accuracy from the paused timestamp

tests.scenario: App update preserves login status
steps: Update the app to the latest version
tests.expected_result: The user remains logged in and no login prompt appears

tests.scenario: Device restart preserves login status
tests.expected_result: The user remains logged in and no login prompt appears
